summary: Parses a URL-like string into its recognized components, or returns null when it does not match the expected URL format.
signature_intent: Accepts a URL string and returns either a structured component object or null.
behavior: Returns null for input that is not recognized as a valid URL-like value.
Returns an object containing the parsed protocol, optional credentials, host, optional port, and path components.
Preserves parsed component text as captured from the input.
edge_cases: Unmatched input produces null instead of throwing.
Optional URL parts may be absent in the returned structure depending on the accepted format.
